page.title: [XX-Reports-XX]
page.subtitle: [XX-Generate insights about your financial health-XX]
page.reportCount: [XX-{count, plural, one {# report available} other {# reports available}}-XX]

descriptions.spending-by-category: [XX-See where your money goes with a breakdown of expenses by category over time.-XX]
descriptions.spending-by-payee: [XX-Track how much you spend with each merchant or vendor over time.-XX]
descriptions.monthly-spending-trend: [XX-View your spending patterns month over month to identify trends.-XX]
descriptions.monthly-category-breakdown: [XX-See expense and income by category broken down month by month, with subtotals, averages, and deviation highlighting.-XX]
descriptions.income-vs-expenses: [XX-Compare your income to expenses and track your savings rate over time.-XX]
descriptions.income-by-source: [XX-Break down your income streams to understand where your money comes from.-XX]
descriptions.net-worth: [XX-Track your total net worth including all accounts, assets, and liabilities.-XX]
descriptions.account-balances: [XX-View balance history for all your accounts over a selected time period.-XX]
descriptions.cash-flow: [XX-Detailed view of money coming in and going out across all accounts.-XX]
descriptions.tax-summary: [XX-Annual summary of tax-deductible expenses and taxable income.-XX]
descriptions.year-over-year: [XX-Compare this year to previous years to track financial progress.-XX]
descriptions.debt-payoff-timeline: [XX-Visualize your debt reduction progress with projections for payoff dates.-XX]
descriptions.loan-amortization: [XX-Detailed payment schedules for mortgages and loans with principal vs interest breakdown.-XX]
descriptions.credit-utilization: [XX-See how much of your available credit you are using across credit cards and lines of credit.-XX]
descriptions.investment-performance: [XX-Track portfolio returns, gains/losses, and asset allocation over time.-XX]
descriptions.dividend-income: [XX-Track capital gains and losses (realized + unrealized) alongside dividend and interest income.-XX]
descriptions.sector-weightings: [XX-Analyze portfolio sector exposure from individual stocks and ETFs.-XX]
descriptions.realized-gains: [XX-Track realized gains and losses from sold securities for tax planning and performance review.-XX]
descriptions.portfolio-value: [XX-Visualize your total investment portfolio value with historical trends and period returns.-XX]
descriptions.investment-transactions: [XX-Complete history of all investment transactions with filtering by action, account, and date.-XX]
descriptions.security-type-allocation: [XX-View portfolio allocation by asset type (stocks, ETFs, mutual funds, bonds) with drill-down into holdings.-XX]
descriptions.geographic-allocation: [XX-Analyze portfolio geographic exposure by exchange and region for diversification insights.-XX]
descriptions.dividend-yield-growth: [XX-Track dividend yield, per-security yields, year-over-year growth, and payment frequency analysis.-XX]
descriptions.security-performance: [XX-Deep dive into individual security performance with price history, transactions, and returns.-XX]
descriptions.currency-exposure: [XX-Understand currency risk with portfolio allocation by currency and exchange rate details.-XX]
descriptions.monte-carlo-simulation: [XX-Project future portfolio outcomes with thousands of randomized return paths and a saved-scenario library.-XX]
descriptions.recurring-expenses: [XX-Identify and monitor subscriptions, memberships, and recurring charges.-XX]
descriptions.spending-anomalies: [XX-Detect unusually large transactions and spending spikes that need attention.-XX]
descriptions.weekend-weekday-spending: [XX-Analyze your spending patterns based on day of week to understand habits.-XX]
descriptions.monthly-comparison: [XX-Compare any month to the previous month across income, expenses, net worth, and investments.-XX]
descriptions.uncategorized-transactions: [XX-Find and categorize transactions that are missing categories.-XX]
descriptions.duplicate-transactions: [XX-Identify potential duplicate entries that may need review or deletion.-XX]
descriptions.upcoming-bills: [XX-Visual calendar of scheduled transactions and upcoming bill due dates.-XX]
descriptions.bill-payment-history: [XX-Track payment patterns and history for recurring bills and scheduled transactions.-XX]
descriptions.budget-vs-actual: [XX-Compare your budgeted amounts to actual spending over time across all categories.-XX]
descriptions.budget-health-score: [XX-Get a 0-100 health score for your budget with detailed per-category impact analysis.-XX]
descriptions.budget-seasonal-patterns: [XX-Discover seasonal trends and high-spending months across your budget categories.-XX]
descriptions.budget-trend: [XX-Line chart showing total budgeted vs total actual spending over 6-12 months to track improvement.-XX]
descriptions.category-performance: [XX-Table showing each category budget performance over multiple months with trend indicators.-XX]
descriptions.savings-rate: [XX-Track your savings rate (income minus expenses divided by income) over time vs your target.-XX]
descriptions.health-score-history: [XX-Line chart of monthly budget health scores showing your financial trajectory over time.-XX]
descriptions.flex-group-analysis: [XX-Stacked bar chart for each flex group showing component categories with group limit reference.-XX]
descriptions.seasonal-spending-map: [XX-Heatmap grid showing 12 months across all categories to identify seasonal spending patterns.-XX]

toasts.scenarioNameRequired: [XX-Please enter a scenario name to save.-XX]
toasts.simulationFailed: [XX-Simulation failed. Check inputs and try again.-XX]
toasts.loadFailed: [XX-Failed to load Monte Carlo data. Please refresh.-XX]
toasts.currentValueFailed: [XX-Failed to fetch the current portfolio value.-XX]

monteCarlo.noScenarios: [XX-No saved scenarios. Configure inputs on the right and click Save.-XX]
monteCarlo.withdrawalNote: [XX-Annual withdrawal is in today's value and is grown by the inflation rate each year so purchasing power stays constant throughout the withdrawal phase. The success-rate target is also compared against each path's final value in today's terms.-XX]
monteCarlo.cashFlowsNote: [XX-One-time or recurring inflows / outflows that layer on top of the base contribution and withdrawal phases. Use a positive amount for income (pension, sale proceeds, inheritance) and a negative amount for expenses (renovation, college, etc).-XX]
monteCarlo.historicalNote: [XX-Mean and volatility are recomputed from the year-over-year price history of the holdings in the selected accounts each time you run. Inflation and simulation count below still apply.-XX]
monteCarlo.saveAsDialogDesc: [XX-Enter a name for this scenario. Keep the existing name to overwrite.-XX]
monteCarlo.deleteConfirmMessage: [XX-This will permanently delete "{name}" and any cash flows attached to it.-XX]
monteCarlo.overwriteConfirmMessage: [XX-A scenario named "{name}" already exists. Saving will replace its inputs and cash flows.-XX]

monteCarloPerformance.rowTwrNominalDesc: [XX-Geometric mean of the simulated annual returns. Ignores cash flows and is reported in nominal terms (not adjusted for inflation).-XX]
monteCarloPerformance.rowTwrRealDesc: [XX-Geometric mean of the simulated annual returns, adjusted for inflation so the result is in today's purchasing power.-XX]
monteCarloPerformance.rowEndBalanceNominalDesc: [XX-Final portfolio value at the end of the simulation horizon, in future-dollar (nominal) terms.-XX]
monteCarloPerformance.rowEndBalanceRealDesc: [XX-Final portfolio value discounted back to today's purchasing power using the inflation rate.-XX]
monteCarloPerformance.rowMeanReturnNominalDesc: [XX-Arithmetic average of the simulated annual returns. Always greater than or equal to the time-weighted return when volatility is non-zero.-XX]
monteCarloPerformance.rowAnnualizedVolatilityDesc: [XX-Standard deviation of the simulated annual returns — a measure of how much returns vary year-to-year.-XX]
monteCarloPerformance.rowMaxDrawdownDesc: [XX-Largest peak-to-trough drop in portfolio value during the simulation, including the effect of contributions and withdrawals.-XX]
monteCarloPerformance.rowMaxDrawdownExCashflowsDesc: [XX-Largest peak-to-trough drop driven purely by investment returns, ignoring contributions and withdrawals.-XX]
monteCarloPerformance.rowSafeWithdrawalRateDesc: [XX-Largest constant inflation-adjusted withdrawal, expressed as a percentage of the starting balance, that exactly depletes the portfolio at the end of the horizon.-XX]
monteCarloPerformance.rowPerpetualWithdrawalRateDesc: [XX-Largest constant inflation-adjusted withdrawal, as a percentage of the starting balance, that preserves the real value of the portfolio at the end of the horizon.-XX]

monteCarloHoldingStats.selectAccounts: [XX-Select one or more accounts to see per-holding historical returns.-XX]

monthlyComparison.netWorthSummary: [XX-Your net worth in {currentMonth} was {netWorth}, which was {changeAmount} compared to {previousMonth}.-XX]

portfolioValue.intradayFallbackTitle: [XX-Detailed intraday pricing isn't available because {symbols} use MSN Money, which doesn't expose intraday quotes. Showing daily snapshots instead.-XX]
portfolioValue.intradayFallbackTitleGeneric: [XX-Detailed intraday pricing isn't available because one or more holdings use MSN Money, which doesn't expose intraday quotes. Showing daily snapshots instead.-XX]
